templates: {name} has worked the forge at {business} since {pronoun} was old enough to hold a hammer — {years} years now. {personality_line} {hook}
The best ironwork in the region comes out of {name}'s shop. {pronoun_cap} doesn't advertise; the work speaks for itself. {personality_line} {hook}
{name} came to {town} as an apprentice to the old smith. When the master retired, {pronoun} took over without ceremony. {personality_line} {hook}

personality_lines.brave: There are stories about {pronoun_obj} turning away a tax collector at sword-point. {pronoun_cap} neither confirms nor denies them.
personality_lines.cautious: {pronoun_cap} inspects every weld twice. A blade that fails its owner is a failure of the maker.
personality_lines.greedy: {pronoun_cap} will work for anyone with coin. Politics are not {pronoun_pos} concern.
personality_lines.generous: {pronoun_cap} has repaired tools for farmers on bad harvests and asked nothing in return.
personality_lines.curious: {pronoun_cap} is always trying something new — alloys, tempering methods, strange designs from old books.
personality_lines.suspicious: {pronoun_cap} asks what the blade is for before agreeing to make it.
personality_lines.loyal: Half the guard's weapons were made by {pronoun_obj}, and {pronoun} expects them to remember that.
personality_lines.pious: The horseshoe over {pronoun_pos} door has hung there since the forge was first lit.
personality_lines.cynical: {pronoun_cap} has seen enough to know that a good sword rarely prevents a bad war.
personality_lines.hot-tempered: {pronoun_pos} apprentices learn quickly not to question {pronoun_obj} in front of customers.

hooks: A recent order came in for a weapon {pronoun} has never been asked to make before. {pronoun_cap} took the coin and has been uneasy since.
{pronoun_cap} found something in the old forge's foundation when {pronoun} was re-laying the stones. {pronoun_cap} sealed it back up.
An old debt is coming due — the kind measured in favors, not gold.
{pronoun_cap} recognizes the insignia on a recent traveler's scabbard and hasn't said anything yet.
The forge has been running hot for a week. {pronoun_cap} doesn't know why.
